zh.lifeSummary: 當Hywel Ap Madog of Montgomery於大約1230年出生在威爾士卡迪甘史爾利朗洛時，他的父親Madog Trahearn Ap21歲，母親Jane Ferch Trahaearn41歲。他於大約1256年與Margaret Ferch Rhys of Carmarthen在英國威爾斯蒙格莫利夏爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1324年享年95歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hywel Ap Madog of Montgomery于大约1230年出生在威尔士卡迪甘史爾利朗洛时，他的父亲Madog Trahearn Ap21岁，母亲Jane Ferch Trahaearn41岁。他于大约1256年与Margaret Ferch Rhys of Carmarthen在英国威尔斯蒙格莫利夏爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1324年享年95岁。

nameMeanings.name: Ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): habitational name from Apt, the Yiddish name of Opatów in Świętokrzyskie Voivodeship, Poland. The placename (in German, Yiddish, and Polish) is from a root meaning ‘abbot’, the place having been named for the local abbey. Compare   Abt  .

variants.name: Abt
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Helmut, Horst, Johann, Kurt.

German and Dutch: from Middle Low German or Middle Dutch abt ‘abbot’, hence a metonymic occupational name for a servant of an abbot or a nickname for someone thought to resemble an abbot in some way. In some instances it may have been a topographic or habitational name referring to a house named with this word.
Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): variant of   Abt  , a habitational name from Opatów in Poland.

variants.name: Apter
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Avrohom, Bronya, Eliezer, Naftali.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name for someone from Apt (see   Apt  ).
English: habitational name from Aptor in Marldon, Devon, composed of Old English uppe ‘up, above’ + torr ‘rocky outcrop’.

nameMeanings.name: Madog
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Madore
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Eusebe, Fernand, Lucien, Normand, Adhemar, Adrien, Donat, Elzear, Francois, Gaetan, Gilles.
French Canadian: from a French shortened form of the Spanish personal name Amador, from Latin Amator (from amator ‘lover’), a Christian saint's name. Compare Mador .
In some cases possibly also Breton (Madoré): nickname meaning literally ‘good help’, from Old Breton mat ‘good’ and uuoret ‘help’.

nameMeanings.name: Hywel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional: originally a byname from a vocabulary word meaning ‘eminent, conspicuous’; it was common in the Middle Ages and was revived in the 20th-century.

variants.name: Hywell
meanings: Traditional: originally a byname from a vocabulary word meaning ‘eminent, conspicuous’; it was common in the Middle Ages and was revived in the 20th-century.

variants.name: Howell
meanings: Anglicized form of the Welsh name Hywel , or a transferred use of the surname derived from that name.

en.lifeSummary: When Hywel Ap Madog of Montgomery was born about 1230, in Llangynllo, Cardiganshire, Wales, his father, Madog Trahearn Ap, was 21 and his mother, Jane Ferch Trahaearn, was 41. He married Margaret Ferch Rhys of Carmarthen about 1256, in Montgomeryshire, Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1324, at the age of 95.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hywel Ap Madog of Montgomery est né environ 1230, à Llangynllo, Cardiganshire, Galles, son père, Madog Trahearn Ap, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Jane Ferch Trahaearn, avait 41 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Ferch Rhys of Carmarthen environ 1256, à Montgomeryshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1324, à l’âge de 95 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hywel Ap Madog of Montgomery um 1230 in Llangynllo, Cardiganshire, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Madog Trahearn Ap 21 und seine Mutter Jane Ferch Trahaearn 41. Er hat um 1256 in Montgomeryshire, Wales, United Kingdom Margaret Ferch Rhys of Carmarthen geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1324 im Alter von 95 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hywel Ap Madog of Montgomery è nato il circa 1230 nel Llangynllo, Cardiganshire, Galles, il suo padre, Madog Trahearn Ap, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Jane Ferch Trahaearn, aveva 41 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Ferch Rhys of Carmarthen circa 1256, nel Montgomeryshire, Galles, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1324, all'età di 95 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Hywel Ap Madog of Montgomeryが約1230年にウェールズカーディガンシュアイアラングインロで生まれた時，父Madog Trahearn Apは21歳，母Jane Ferch Trahaearnは41歳であった。約1256年にイギリスウェールズモントゴメリシュアイアでMargaret Ferch Rhys of Carmarthenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1324年に95歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hywel Ap Madog of Montgomery(이)가 대략 1230년 웨일스 카디건실르 랭이로에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Madog Trahearn Ap(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Jane Ferch Trahaearn(은)는 41세였다. 그는 대략 1256년 영국 웨일스 몽고머이실르에서 Margaret Ferch Rhys of Carmarthen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1324년 95세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hywel Ap Madog of Montgomery nasceu aproximadamente 1230, em Llangynllo, Cardiganshire, Gales, seu pai, Madog Trahearn Ap, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Jane Ferch Trahaearn, tinha 41 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Ferch Rhys of Carmarthen aproximadamente 1256, em Montgomeryshire, Gales, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1324, com 95 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hywel Ap Madog of Montgomery родился около 1230 г. в местности ллангинллоу, кардиганьшир, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Madog Trahearn Ap было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Jane Ferch Trahaearn, 41. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Ferch Rhys of Carmarthen около 1256 г. в местности монтгомиришир, Уэльс, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1324 г. в возрасте 95 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hywel Ap Madog of Montgomery nació aproximadamente 1230, en Llangynllo, Cardiganshire, Gales, su papá, Madog Trahearn Ap, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Jane Ferch Trahaearn, tenía 41 años. Se casó con Margaret Ferch Rhys of Carmarthen aproximadamente 1256, en Montgomeryshire, Gales, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1324, a la edad de 95 años.
